title: Applied Materials Investor Relations
note: Primary source for earnings releases, SEC filings, annual reports, and financial guidance.

title: Applied Materials — Products and Services
note: Company product descriptions, technology overviews, and applications engineering resources.

title: Applied Materials Market Cap History
note: Historical and current market capitalization data used to place AMAT in the S&P 500 top-35 ranking.

title: Applied Materials Annual Report FY2024 (10-K)
note: Fiscal year 2024 10-K (ending October 2024) providing segment revenue breakdown, margins, R&D spend, geographic revenue, and risk factors including China export control exposure.

title: Tokyo Electron Products
note: TEL's semiconductor equipment product catalog, referenced for CVD alternative competitive positioning.

title: Axcelis Technologies — Purion Ion Implant Family
note: Primary commercial alternative to AMAT's Varian ion implant line; referenced for competitive alternative assessment.

title: Google / SkyWater Open Source PDK
note: The most widely deployed open-source semiconductor process design kit; illustrates the current ceiling of open alternatives to commercial fab processes (130nm node).

title: Lam Research
note: Lam Research's corporate site, referenced for customer support services as a structural analog to AMAT AGS in mixed-vendor fab environments.
